entities.name: CTA Library
entities.context: System for organizing standard call-to-action phrases by type, firmness, and usage limits

entities.name: Info Request
entities.context: CTA type for requesting information, uses soft/balanced tone

entities.name: Calendar Invite
entities.context: CTA type for scheduling, uses soft tone

entities.name: Decision Prompt
entities.context: CTA type for prompting decisions with deadlines, uses balanced/direct tone

entities.name: Offer Help
entities.context: CTA type for offering assistance, uses soft tone

entities.name: Follow-Up Reminder
entities.context: CTA type for flagging threads, uses balanced tone

entities.name: Deal Close
entities.context: CTA type for closing deals, uses direct tone

entities.name: Firmness Dial
entities.context: Parameter controlling CTA tone intensity: Soft, Balanced, or Direct

relationships.context: Info Request is a standard CTA type in the library
Calendar Invite is a standard CTA type in the library
Decision Prompt is a standard CTA type in the library
Offer Help is a standard CTA type in the library
Follow-Up Reminder is a standard CTA type in the library
Deal Close is a standard CTA type in the library
Firmness Dial controls tone intensity for all CTA types
